mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals an ongoing monetary tightening cycle that raises discount rates for equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in nonfarm payrolls signals weakening labor market conditions that reduce corporate earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real estate finance and housing starts indicates strong consumer demand that drives equity market optimism, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or 60-day returns in combined growth scenarios are not significantly higher than baseline

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production signals improving manufacturing activity that boosts corporate profits, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances with INDPRO growth > 1.5%

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in CPI inflation reduces central bank policy uncertainty, lowering equity risk premiums and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances with CPI deflation

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly expansion in GDP growth indicates strong macroeconomic momentum that drives equity market participation, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or 60-day returns in GDP expansion scenarios are not significantly higher than baseline

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in unemployment rate and increase in payroll employment signals a tight labor market that drives wage inflation pressures, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances with combined UNRATE decline and PAYEMS growth

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production signals weakening manufacturing activity that reduces corporate earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances with INDPRO decline
